name: Contentstack
description: Enterprise headless CMS platform with composable digital experience capabilities

description.value: Enterprise headless CMS platform with composable digital experience capabilities

repository.comment: Proprietary SaaS platform; client SDKs are open source on GitHub

initial-release.comment: Officially launched as independent company in January 2018; product developed earlier at Built.io starting around 2012-2014

latest-release.comment: Continuously deployed SaaS; no discrete releases

primary-language.comment: Closed-source SaaS; client SDKs available in TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Ruby, PHP, Java, .NET, iOS, Android

database-support.comment: Managed infrastructure; users don't interact with database directly

api-type.comment: Content Delivery API, Content Management API, Analytics API, Image Delivery API; GraphQL supports queries only (no mutations)

multi-tenancy.comment: Supports multiple stacks per organization with branch support

static-site-generation.comment: Works with static site generators via API; official integrations with Next.js SSG/ISR, Gatsby, Nuxt

edge-deployment.comment: Content delivered via Fastly CDN; CDN included free with all plans

content-types.comment: Flexible content modeling with modular content types and Global Fields

custom-fields.comment: Custom field extensions available via Marketplace for integrations like YouTube, Brightcove, Adobe DAM

field-types.comment: Rich set of field types including Modular Blocks for flexible content structures

nested-components.comment: Modular Blocks allow reusable, nestable content components

localization.comment: 200+ languages supported; custom languages; data inheritance from fallback language; each locale has independent versioning

embedded-interactives.comment: Custom field extensions and JSON RTE plugins enable embedding interactive content

content-versioning.comment: Each entry version is tracked; localized entries have separate version histories

draft-publish.comment: Workflow stages including Draft, Review, and Publish states

scheduled-publishing.comment: Schedule publish/unpublish up to 12 months in advance; Releases feature for coordinated deployments

approval-workflows.comment: Multi-stage approval workflows with Four-Eyes Principle (prevent self-approval); role-based stage assignments

content-locking.comment: Could not verify content locking feature from official documentation

audit-logging.comment: Stack and organization-level audit logs; 30-day retention; export to CSV; filter by user, action, module

media-library.comment: Built-in asset management; integrations with external DAM systems like Bynder, Adobe DAM, Frontify

image-transformations.comment: Image Preset Builder app for transformations and optimization

external-media-storage.comment: Integrations with Adobe DAM, Bynder, Frontify, and other DAM systems via Marketplace

video-support.comment: Video upload supported; integrations with Brightcove and other video platforms

svg-support.comment: SVG files supported in asset management

folder-organization.comment: Asset organization with folders and metadata

role-based-access.comment: Built-in roles (Owner, Admin, Developer, Content Manager) plus custom roles

granular-permissions.comment: Content type and workflow stage level permissions; Publish Rules for fine-grained control

sso-saml.comment: SAML 2.0 SSO with Okta, Azure AD, OneLogin, Google, Auth0; IdP Role Mapping; plan-dependent features

team-collaboration.comment: Workflow assignments, user notifications, collaborative editing

audience-restrictions.comment: Content delivery is API-based; access control implemented in frontend application

typescript-sdk.comment: Official TypeScript Delivery SDK; TSGen plugin generates TypeScript typings from content types

content-type-sdk.comment: JavaScript Management SDK for programmatic content model management

cli-tools.comment: Contentstack CLI with plugins for migrations, TypeScript generation, and management tasks

local-development.comment: Local preview via Live Preview feature; starter apps for local development

webhooks.comment: Webhooks for real-time integrations; webhook templates for AWS Lambda, Algolia, translation systems

plugin-system.comment: Marketplace with apps and extensions; Custom Fields, Sidebar, Dashboard, JSON RTE plugins

admin-ui-customization.comment: Experience Extensions for custom fields, sidebar widgets, dashboard widgets, and full page locations

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with API reference, tutorials, sample apps, and Academy courses; comprehensive but dense

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official starter apps and documentation for Next.js, Nuxt.js, Gatsby; Launch hosting with Next.js support

search-integration.comment: Algolia integration via webhooks; API-based content queries

preview-mode.comment: Live Preview for real-time content editing preview; visual editing capabilities

ecommerce-integration.comment: Integrations with Shopify, commercetools and other e-commerce platforms

analytics-integration.comment: Built-in Analytics API for usage metrics; Google Analytics integration

ai-features.comment: AI Assistant for content generation; Brand Kit for on-brand AI content; Automate with AI connectors; real-time translation

cdn-included.comment: Fastly CDN included free; content delivered from nearest server globally

response-caching.comment: CDN-backed caching; GraphQL queries unlimited on CDN cache

rate-limits.comment: 80 requests per second per organization to origin; CDN cached requests unlimited

global-regions.comment: 7 regions: AWS (NA, EU, AU), Azure (NA, EU), GCP (NA, EU); each region is independent with disaster recovery

free-tier.comment: No free plan; free trial available; paid plans start around $995/month

open-source.comment: Proprietary SaaS platform; client SDKs are open source

pricing-model.comment: Three tiers with contract-based pricing; starts around $995/month; many add-on features; contact sales for pricing

commercial-support.comment: Dedicated support included; enterprise SLA available

enterprise-features.comment: SSO/SAML, multi-region deployment, dedicated infrastructure, audit logging, advanced workflows, SLA
